rods.name: Training Rod
rods.description: Starter rod with high control and low value scaling.

rods.name: Carbon Rod
rods.description: A light, responsive rod that boosts luck steadily and keeps casts fast.

rods.name: Timberline Rod
rods.description: Comfort and precision over raw luck. Great for stable fishing sessions.

rods.name: Crystal Rod
rods.description: Polished and efficient. A balanced rod that speeds lures while maintaining decent luck.

rods.name: Abyssal Rod
rods.description: Deep-sea tuned. Faster lure movement increases encounter rate, at the cost of control.

rods.name: Mythical Rod
rods.description: An enchanted rod favored by anglers who chase rare pulls. High luck with solid control.

rods.name: Steadyline Rod
rods.description: Meta for perfect catches and long sessions.

rods.name: Stormbreaker Rod
rods.description: Performs best during rain and thunder events.

rods.name: Frostbite Rod
rods.description: Specialized for cold biomes and winter value spikes.

rods.name: Sunflare Rod
rods.description: Excels in clear weather daytime rotations.

rods.name: Tidetwister Rod
rods.description: Aggressive speed profile for ocean islands.

rods.name: Moonlit Rod
rods.description: Strong all-around rod for rare night catches.

rods.name: Voidcaster Rod
rods.description: High risk, high return late-game rod.

rods.name: Masterline Rod
rods.description: Top-end progression rod with premium consistency.

rod_sources.rod: Fished up during a Zeus Storm in Zeus's Rod Room

totems.name: Sundial Totem
totems.effect: Advances the [[Weather and Events#Day and night cycle|daylight cycle]]

totems.name: Zeus Storm Totem
totems.effect:
Summons a {{Weather|Zeus Storm}}
Additionally, all players in [[Zeus's Rod Room]] have a 50% chance to be "Struck Down" when the totem is used, killing them and awarding the "{{PlayerTitle|Chosen By Zeus}}" [[Titles|Title]]

totems.name: Bloom Totem
totems.effect: Resets all flowers in [[Living Garden]] and [[Verdant Pocket]]

totems.name: Colossal Dragon Hunt Totem
totems.effect: Summons a [[Colossal Ethereal Dragon Hunt]], [[Colossal Ancient Dragon Hunt]], or [[Colossal Blue Dragon Hunt]]
